assertions.description: INCORRECT: The connectivity_issues.multi_driver_nets list contains 28 entries, of which 20 are false positives where the same component/pin pair is listed twice as both drivers (e.g., IC10 pin 8 appears twice on net __unnamed_0). This duplication in the driver list is an internal analyzer bug causing spurious multi-driver warnings. Only 8 entries are real cases (D0-D7 shared between ROM IC2 and RAM IC3), which are also not real errors since ROM and RAM share the data bus with appropriate chip-select logic.

INCORRECT: The detected_bus_signals entry for the A bus reports width=74 with range A0..A15, implying a 74-bit bus. The actual bus is 16-bit (A0..A15). The 74 figure is the total count of net label instances in the schematic (each address line appears ~4-5 times across multiple ICs). The 'width' field should represent the number of unique signals (16), not the total label occurrence count. Same issue affects D bus (width=48, should be 8) and PA bus (width=16, should be 8).
